questionText:
Consider the following molecules:

The correct order of rate of hydrolysis is :
subject: Chemistry

questionText:
Among the following, the number of halide(s) which is/are inert to hydrolysis is _________.

(A) BF3

(B) SiCl4

(C) PCl5

(D) SF6
subject: Chemistry
solution:
BF3 – Shows Partial hydrolysis

SiCl4 – Undergoes hydrolysis readily

PCl5 – Undergoes hydrolysis by addition– elimination mechanism.

SF6 – Due to crowding Inert towards hydrolysis.
